meaning: 青森[日本本州岛北岸港市]
examples: In Aomori, Shikoku and Kyushu, I once see that kind of valley.
Fifth Asian Winter Games in 2003 will be held in the city of Aomori in Japan.
The annual rice field art festival began recently in the Aomori village of Inakadate, Japan.
It was moored at Hachinohe in the Aomori prefecture when the tsunami hit last year.
The building of a reprocessing plant at Rokkashomura, in Aomori prefecture, has been disappointingly slow.
